name: Côtes-d'Armor (France)
description: Per fess dancetty (the line drawn as mountain peaks): blue above, and below white strewn with black ermine spots.
history: The ermine field is the historic emblem of Brittany, while the blue and indented line evoke the sea and coastline of this maritime département.

features.role: per fess dancetty, blue over white
black ermine spots strewn on the white lower field
